scenarios.description: children() on newly created Element with no child nodes returns empty list (childNodeSize()==0)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); // no children added
pseudocode: TEST TC01 children on empty element

scenarios.description: children() with only text nodes returns empty list (filters out non-Element instances)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("p"); el.appendText("text"); // one TextNode child
pseudocode: TEST TC02 children filters text nodes

scenarios.description: children() with single Element child returns list of size 1 (filters and collects Element)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); Element child = new Element("span"); parent.appendChild(child);
pseudocode: TEST TC03 children returns single element child

scenarios.description: children() with mixed children returns only Element instances (filters out TextNode among multiple nodes)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); el.appendChild(new TextNode("t1")); el.appendChild(new Element("a")); el.appendText("t2"); el.appendChild(new Element("b"));
pseudocode: TEST TC04 children filters mixed nodes

scenarios.description: children() uses cached shadowChildrenRef on second call without recomputing list
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); Element c1=new Element("x"); Element c2=new Element("y"); el.appendChild(c1); el.appendChild(c2); // first call populates cache
scenarios.expectedResult: first and second call return identical list instance and size==2
pseudocode: TEST TC05 children caching avoids recompute

scenarios.description: children() recomputes after nodelistChanged invalidates cache
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("p"); Element a=new Element("i"); el.appendChild(a); // populate cache; then directly call el.nodelistChanged() to invalidate; then append another Element
scenarios.expectedResult: after invalidation, children().size()==2 containing original and new element
pseudocode: TEST TC06 children recompute after cache invalidation
